# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T1-A-E1
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
print(len(cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left")))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T1-B-E1
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S17-T1-B-E1: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E1 (guiado) — Concepto: anti-join con `indicator=True`. Fixture cli={C001,C002}, tx solo C001. Left merge + filtra `_merge=='left_only'`; im…». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `import pandas as pd`. Pista del paquete: «merge left indicator.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección. Variante explorer del ancla `import pandas as pd`.

# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T2-B-E1
import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "mes": ["e", "f"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
w = long.pivot(index="id", columns="mes", values="monto")
w.columns = [f"monto_{c}" for c in w.columns]
print(list(w.columns))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S17-T2-B-E1: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E1 (guiado) — Concepto: nombres estables post-pivot. exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T3-B-E2
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-05", "2024-03-01", "2024-02-10"]),
})
df["cohort"] = df.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min").dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(df.drop_duplicates("cliente_id").set_index("cliente_id")["cohort"].to_dict())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S17-T3-B-E2: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E2 (independiente) — Concepto: cohorte mensual por primera fecha. Fixture C001 (ene y mar), C002 (feb). Asigna cohort YYYY-MM con min fecha;…». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `import pandas as pd`. Pista del paquete: «groupby transform min.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección. Variante explorer del ancla `import pandas as pd`.

# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T4-B-E2
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 5.0]})

# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S17-T4-B-E3

    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"],

    "monto": [3.0, 10.0],
})

feat = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max()
print(feat.to_dict())
